channel.title: fronting on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in fronting on IT notes

item.title: Domain Fronting
item.description: If your domain becomes blocked you “could use” another one to bypass the block: curl -s -H "Host: your-blocked-domain" -H "Connection: close" "https://new-tld/your/path" Both domains must be hosted within the same CDN, example: curl -s -H "Host: images-na.ssl-images-amazon.com" -H "Connection: close" "https://cdn.atlassian.com/images/I/01rgQ3jqo7L.css" More info: https://www.optiv.com/blog/escape-and-evasion-egressing-restricted-networks https://www.peew.pw/blog/2018/2/22/how-i-identified-93k-domain-frontable-cloudfront-domains
